emails.body: Re: Fellow referred to me by Ken Lay It was not mentioned to me. I'm copying rosie and vanessa to find out if this was a simple referral (in which case you should keep the work to a minimum return the call, but don't get distracted from your other efforts) or whether Ken is especially interested in this and wants us to follow through.
